college_info.college_name: Pravara Centre for Management Research and Development: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Cutoff, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The MAT 2026 exam result for admission to the MBA course for the CBT and the PBT modes will be announced soon.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview: Founded in 1994, Pravara Centre for Management Research and Development is a private institute. It is located in Pune, Maharashtra. The institute is accredited with AICTE. Pravara Centre for Management Research and Development provides PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 1 course across specialisation such as Operations. Some of the course offered at this institute include MBA/PGDM. Pravara Centre for Management Research and Development fees is INR 1,96,000. The student intake for these courses is 120. Pravara Centre for Management Research and Development offers these course across fields such as Business & Management Studies. Pravara Centre for Management Research and Development offers all the campus facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Pravara Centre for Management Research and Development.

review_content.Placements: Our college has a good placement cell which always provides good jobs in the best MNCs. It helps us to grow far in our career and to build a good future. They also provide a good environment on the campus which help students to grow in all directions. They offered guest lectures which helped in a real-time environment in MNCs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is great. The college provides free Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs and classrooms. There is a huge library with thousands of books which are helpful in gaining more knowledge. There is a huge canteen which serves good food with great taste. There is also a huge playground with the availability of all sports materials.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Enjoyed, Learned a lot with Excellent Faculty. A memorable College Life .

review_content.Placements: The college offers good placement and internship opportunities for the students. The college will be providing the official mail Id on which you will be updated about the upcoming Job vacancies and opportunities in and around Pune. They even provide and arrange various sessions on enhancing the interview skills, Group Discussions, Case Study, and various soft skill parameters which are required to outshine in the job market. The college organizes the in-campus interviews for the internship and placements. Many students got absorbed in the same from my batch to name a few in companies like Inteliment, GSB Cables, Toyota, and many more. One can know about the recruiters from the website and college brochure. About the salary offered is average for the freshers, which will primarily depend on the performance in the interview and what value you will be adding to the company. Even in difficult times of Covid-19, the TPO (Training and Placement Officer) of the college is coming up with the various remote jobs and Virtual internship Offers, upskilling and reskilling webinars, various short term courses, etc. One should stay in touch with the TPO Mr. Shrikant Sir in order to get insights and advice related to Resume Building and other necessary skill sets required for the particular industry. However, the TPO sessions on the same are also arranged in the time table.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure & facilities, highly qualified and helpful teachers, good college atmosphere.

review_content.Placements: About 65 percent plus students got placed in our batch, few of the remaining were interested in Entrepreneurship so they moved into that path. Almost all the students got internships through college for the different specialisations : HR, Marketing, Finance, IT, Operations, Supply Chain & International Business.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is also good at the college with canteen, medical facilities, and a lot of inter college activities in the form of sports, dancing, drama, elocutions happen so all these arrangements are also made by the college. Outdoor Sports includes Football, basketball, swimming. Indoor Sports include chess, Caroom etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college because of faculty members.

review_content.Placements: This time the placements were offered only for marketing and HR. For finance placement, the placement officer has brought many companies, but they did not fit our finance students criteria. The salary packages offered were low for finance. The placement cell is headed by a highly qualified and talented placement officer, Shrikant Sir. Many steps which students have to go through have been taken care of by the placement cell. Great support is provided by our mentors as well as college seniors.
review_content.Infrastructure: Pravara Centre for Management Research & Development is located in the centre of the city. It has been designed with modern buildings and is equipped with various modern-day facilities like computer lab, an extensive library with academics and external literature. The canteen served very healthy food at a reasonable price. There is Wi-Fi with a wide connection on the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: The college provides the best infrastructure and impressive facilities.

review_content.Placements: Placement drives are going on in our college. Reputed companies visit the college for placements. There is a good placement committee which works to provide the best results. Last year, placements were very impressive. There are various streams, and all are provided with the best placement opportunities. About 75% of students are already placed, and the remaining are in progress.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is the best. There are well-organised classrooms equipped with projectors. There is a huge seminar hall which can accomodate a maximum number of people. Recently a Wi-Fi facility is provided for students. There is a huge computer laboratory which consists of about 70-80 computers. There is a well-organised library to study, and it offers a peaceful environment. The campus is surrounded by Vetal Tekdi which gives positive vibes. There is a water cooler for drinking water. Washrooms are good, and all other facilities are available. The entire infrastructure is the best.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied because of faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Many students are placed. Some are waiting for placement. Old placement coordinator is not good. They don't placed any one. New placement coordinator is appointed recently. Still waiting for placement. Still need to improve placement system in college and need to improve the contact. College have many contact. But they don't utilities this contact.
review_content.Infrastructure: Faculty is good. Classroom, library is also big, computer lab is good. College need improve the speed of computers. And change the canteen contract because quality of the food is not well in canteen. Restrictions on the students is helpful. But restrictions on events is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Really good in infrastructure & teaching facility.
reviews.review_text: The facilities offered by the campus are excellent. Facilities like Wi-Fi, excellent computer labs, library, medical facilities, sports are available on the campus. The infrastructure of the college is excellent. The quality of the labs & classrooms is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: A very good college for a future ready professional.
reviews.review_text: As per infrastructure, the college is the best! It is located within the heart of the city but also away from the hustle and bustle of the city. All the facilities such as library, playground are also there for the students. For various functions as well there is amphitheatre where the functions are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: You can consider taking an admission here.
reviews.review_text: The college does not have a huge campus, but it does have a big football/cricket ground that the college shares with Vikhe Patil School. But as long as the staff is good, you get efficient knowledge and vast exposure to the current corporate scenario, I don't think the infrastructure matters.

reviews.review_heading: PCMRD college has a really faculty, placement cell and,  good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is one speciality about the PCMRD infrastructure, it is a big spacious building, only for the MBA students with every facility for them. Our college has classrooms with a good seating arrangement, projectors and, a spacious library with updated books. There is a large seminar hall to conduct various seminars, guest lectures, presentations and, group discussions. There is also a big ground for sports and games. And one computer laboratory including 100 computers. On the whole, the college's...

reviews.review_heading: The college is good with great atmosphere, helping faculty, great people, and awesome friends.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is fair with a cool atmosphere. The library and the computer lab are good. The playground and gym are also available in the campus. Overall the college is cool. There is an auditorium in the campus for the entertainment of the students.

reviews.review_heading: Don't Take admission over here.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is "okay". They have a ground but you don't permission to play on that ground as the ground is only for "SHOW". I currently pursuing my MBA degree from this college. They Wi-Fi facility but its very slow and we cant access social medias which is absolutely fine but we cant also access google for information. The labs are well built and have good number of computers and the systems are up to date with anti virus. Library is also "okay" as the books student wants are not available m...

reviews.review_heading: Vikhe Patil Foundation's PCMRD review
reviews.review_text: As the only course they provide right now is MBA, most of the classrooms remain vacant, however, infrastructure is great. It has a canteen, playground, swimming pool, different types of courts, etc. The only problem here is the parking, students are not provided with the proper parking space and are not allowed to park cars which is not that big of a problem.

reviews.review_heading: PCMRD, 2 Years Full-time Post Graduate Masters Degree Programme – MBA
reviews.review_text:
PCMRD (Pravara Centre for management research & development) is located at the centre of the city. It has been designed with modern buildings, and is equipped with  various modern day facilities like computer lab, extensive library with academics and extensive external literature.
Canteen offers very  healthy food for a reasonable price. There is a campus wide wifi connection.

It is one of the best college for MBA following its culture of knowledge transfer to new students with good staff, infrastructure, computer lab and library.
Having 21 year of experience of management studies, weekly guest lectures, entrepreneur activities, college events, inter college competitions, intra college competitions, this college is setting remarkable examples for outsiders to join it. college_info.college_name: College of Engineering Bhubaneswar: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The OJEE 2026 registration process has begun for College of Engineering Bhubaneswar admission to BTech, BPharma, MBA, and MCA programmes. The final date to register is Mar 22, 2026. Additionally, the exam dates are tentatively scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, and from May 7 to May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: How to apply for admission to College of Engineering Bhubaneswar?
faqs.answer:
The candidates can apply online through the College of Engineering Bhubaneswar website. The final selection of the candidates will be based on their academic performance and entrance exam score. Given below are the steps on how to apply to College of Engineering Bhubaneswar:
Step 1: Go to the College of Engineering Bhubaneswar website and click on the "Admissions" tab.
Step 2: Click on the "Apply Online" button.
Step 3: Fill out the application form and submit it along with the required documents.
Step 4: Pay the application fee and submit the form.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at COEB?
faqs.answer: The total fee for MBA at COEB is INR 1.7 Lacs for two-years. Students have to pay INR 85,000 annually. This fee range may include tuition fee and other fee components. The above fee is taken from unofficial sources and hence, is indicative. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the COEB MBA fee.

faqs.question: Can College of Engineering Bhubaneswar (COEB Bhubaneswar) be considered a good college?
faqs.answer: College of Engineering Bhubaneswar (COEB Bhubaneswar) is a reputed institute for MCA, B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in IT & Software, Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. College of Engineering Bhubaneswar (COEB Bhubaneswar) has a review rating of 3.1 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.1 on campuslife, 2.6 on placements, 3.5 on faculty and 3.4 on Infrastructure.

college_info.intro: College of Engineering Bhubaneswar admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The institute offers various UG & PG courses, namely BTech, MTech, BBA, MBA, BCA & MCA along with the Diploma courses under the affiliation of Biju Patnaik University of Technology (BPUT). Given below is the list of popular programmes offered by College of Engineering Bhubaneswar:

placements.overview: College of Engineering Bhubaneswar provides hands-on training on professional business etiquette, through the Pre-Placement Training. College of Engineering Bhubaneswar organises various value-added Programmes to polish students, as per the industry scenario. Some of the prominent recruiters at College of Engineering Bhubaneswar are Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, Capgemini, Google, Balaji, Mahindra, Altratech, UltraTech Cement, Shree Cement, ARF Design, Aditi Solar, Bhive Design Pvt Ltd, Galacon Infrastructure, Manikaran Power Limited, Biraja Constructions Pvt Ltd etc. The key highlights of the placement are given below:

faqs.answer: A:    College of Engineering Bhubaneswar (COEB Bhubaneswar) has placed its selected students in known and reputed companies such as Mojhi, Maxxis Rubber India Pvt Ltd Sanand Gujarat, Xrbia Ltd, Konkan Gyanpeeth College Of Enginerring Karjat, Linpack Technologies Pvt Ltd, Dimple Advisory Pvt Ltd, Terminal Contacts, Christopher Matriculation Higher Secondary School, It Perfect Solutions, Topline Computers.
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters from College of Engineering Bhubaneswar (COEB Bhubaneswar) when it comes to placements?

faqs.answer: A:    As per information available, Rayalaseema Institute of Information And Management Sciences has recorded (aprx) INR 350,000 median salary to students for B.E. / B.Tech course during placements.
faqs.question: What is the median salary of B.E. / B.Tech course available at College of Engineering Bhubaneswar (COEB Bhubaneswar)?

faqs.answer: A:    As per the data available, Median package of MCA course is around INR 350,000.
faqs.question: What is the median package of MCA course that is offered by College of Engineering Bhubaneswar (COEB Bhubaneswar)?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: College of Engineering Bhubaneswar offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. College of Engineering Bhubaneswar courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for College of Engineering Bhubaneswar courses stands around INR 1,37,000 to 3,58,800.

faqs.answer: A:    College of Engineering Bhubaneswar BTech admissions are entirely entrance-based. In order to apply for BTech at COEB, the basic eligibility criteria is to pass Class 12 with minimum 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved category) in Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of the following subjects Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Computer Science/ Biology. Next, aspirants must qualify for JEE Main/ OJEE with a valid score. The final selection is done based on the past academic performance and entrance exam scores.
faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for BTech at College of Engineering Bhubaneswar?

faqs.answer:
A:    College of Engineering Bhubaneswar (COEB Bhubaneswar) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMCACandidate must have completed BCA/ Bachelor Degree in Computer Science Engineering or equivalent Degree.
OR
Candidate must have passed B.Sc./ B.Com./ B.A. with Mathematics at 10+2 Level or at Graduation Level (with additional bridge Courses as per the norms of the concerned University).
Candidate must have secured above mentioned marks (45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category).B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in relevant stream from a recognised Institute.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of minimum 3 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Work hard to achieve success.

review_content.Placements: 85% percent of students are placed in our course. The highest package is 100000, the lowest package is 50000, and the average package is 75000. Our course offers various placement packages, including companies like TCS. Additionally, 45 percent of students received internships. The top role available in our course is Manager.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have various facilities provided like Wi-Fi, labs, cinema halls, auditorium hall, swimming pool, park, garden, etc. Infrastructure like smart classrooms, AC, LEDs, smart libraries, lifts, and many more things are available in our college. All qualities are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Student review of College of Engineering, Bhubaneswar.

review_content.Placements: Placement percentage is above 70% in PCM. The highest package is of 20 Lacs per annum and the lowest is of 5 Lacs per annum. Top recruiters include Google, Amazon, etc. On campus placements are a bit hard to get due to huge number of students, so you can also try off campus just to be safe.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many lab like Electronic, Electrical, Mechanical, Physics and Chemistry etc. Food quality of the hostel is not good. I did not like the food in hostels, but the rooms are great. Cleaning facilities are very good but time limit for outing is very less.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Before 2018-2019, our college was like an Autonomous College.

review_content.Placements: Only 10% of students are placed in our course. The lowest is 1.2 Lacs per annum, and the maximum is 1.7 Lacs per annum. Shree Cement & SPD Construction are the companies. No student got an internship. Junior Engineer & Site Engineer are the most preferred jobs available. This is the problem for everyone who is from a Tier 3 college. I am facing the same issue. The campus package is not more than 3 Lacs per annum. I was feeling very bad asking pass-out seniors about jobs. Then someone gave me a wise suggestion: He told me to find a good company, not a big company. Let me explain, I am a machine learning enthusiast, and he told me to find a startup that is working on data science and machine learning. Don’t worry about salary. It may be very less, but in that organization, you will get the best work experience. Your learning curve will be vertical. Believe me, you will see a wide difference in yourself after 1 year because in a startup, you have to work professionally on your own for a long time (1-1.5 years). After that, you can start applying for big corporates. Now your confidence and professional skills will help you to crack any interview. Don’t waste time or spend a year to find a high-paying job. Or else, if you have good enough skills that fulfill the requirements of big corporates, then definitely you can apply now.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Disappointed with finance

review_content.Placements: The placement rate is very low in our course and specially in our whole college, only 30-50%. Highest package was 4 LPA and lowest was 1.5 LPA. TCS, Wipro, HCL, Royal Enfield, OD Tech were the top recruiting companies. No one got internship from college. Mostly sales and few IT roles are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have got simple classroom with no projectors whereas there are projectors for MCA and b-tech. We have got access to library, computer labs and access to various clubs in our college. Food is average, no medical facility in college, multiple clubs are there.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of College of Engineering Bhubaneswar.

review_content.Placements: Students got placed in our college with the highest and average salary packages. The highest salary package offered for a software developer in 2022 was 12 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides all facilities like Wi-Fi, a chemical lab, a physics lab, a programming lab, an electrical lab, etc. Labs are available for respective branch students. The hostel has a huge playground for cricket and football. The hostel faculty members arrange activities to showcase our talents.
review_content.Faculty: All teachers are helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. They teach us fluently, so we can understand easily. This course curriculum is relevant. It makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are not much difficult in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good placements.

review_content.Placements: More than 50% of students get placements in our college. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA and the average salary package is 3.5 LPA to 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, Tata, HCL, and Wipro. Around 50% to 60% of students get internships. Our college provides a good future for average students also.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available in our college. Free Wi-Fi is available in our college and hostel. Labs are available for all subjects to provide practical knowledge for students. The quality of food served in the hostel is good. Medical facilities and sports are not available. Hostel rooms are clean.

The final selection of the candidates will be based on their academic performance and entrance exam score. Given below are the steps on how to apply to College of Engineering Bhubaneswar:Step 1:Go to the College of Engineering Bhubaneswar website and click on the "Admissions" tab.Step 2:Click on the "Apply Online" button.Step 3:Fill out the application form and submit it along with the required documents.Step 4:Pay the application fee and submit the form.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at College of Engineering Bhubaneswar (COEB Bhubaneswar)?
faqs.answer: Courses offerred by College of Engineering Bhubaneswar (COEB Bhubaneswar) are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at College of Engineering Bhubaneswar (COEB Bhubaneswar) goes up to 858.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in College of Engineering Bhubaneswar (COEB Bhubaneswar) for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
College of Engineering Bhubaneswar (COEB Bhubaneswar) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityMCACandidate must have completed BCA/ Bachelor Degree in Computer Science Engineering or equivalent Degree.
OR
Candidate must have passed B.Sc./ B.Com./ B.A. with Mathematics at 10+2 Level or at Graduation Level (with additional bridge Courses as per the norms of the concerned University).
Candidate must have secured above mentioned marks (45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category).B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in relevant stream from a recognised Institute.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of minimum 3 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree or equivalent in the relevant field of engineering and technology with above mentioned mark

hostel_campus.college_name: College of Engineering Bhubaneswar Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Work hard to achieve success.
reviews.review_text: We have various facilities provided like Wi-Fi, labs, cinema halls, auditorium hall, swimming pool, park, garden, etc. Infrastructure like smart classrooms, AC, LEDs, smart libraries, lifts, and many more things are available in our college. All qualities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Student review of College of Engineering, Bhubaneswar.
reviews.review_text: There are many lab like Electronic, Electrical, Mechanical, Physics and Chemistry etc. Food quality of the hostel is not good. I did not like the food in hostels, but the rooms are great. Cleaning facilities are very good but time limit for outing is very less.

reviews.review_heading: Before 2018-2019, our college was like an Autonomous College.
reviews.review_text: Average facilities and infrastructure are available for our course. Classrooms are good, but labs are not good enough, and machines are very old, with some also not working. The hostel is below average. They take 72,000 per year but provide average quality food, and the rooms are also below average. The canteen is also average and not preferable for all.

reviews.review_heading: Disappointed with finance
reviews.review_text: We have got simple classroom with no projectors whereas there are projectors for MCA and b-tech. We have got access to library, computer labs and access to various clubs in our college. Food is average, no medical facility in college, multiple clubs are there.

reviews.review_heading: Review of College of Engineering Bhubaneswar.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all facilities like Wi-Fi, a chemical lab, a physics lab, a programming lab, an electrical lab, etc. Labs are available for respective branch students. The hostel has a huge playground for cricket and football. The hostel faculty members arrange activities to showcase our talents.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available in our college. Free Wi-Fi is available in our college and hostel. Labs are available for all subjects to provide practical knowledge for students. The quality of food served in the hostel is good. Medical facilities and sports are not available. Hostel rooms are clean.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure without maintenance.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is neither good nor bad. Wi-fi facility is good. Classrooms and labs are student friendly. The canteen food is average.
Hostel is very good. Every floor has a separate wi-fi connections. Which is very good for us and good for our study we can access with Internet without any problem. Food is also good and hygienic for us. We play cricket in evening time so we can refresh our minds. Also play badminton in night hostel have these equipment's for sport purpose.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available on campus with a data limit of 1 GB. Labs did not fulfill the requirements. Library did not contain the latest books and limited books have to be taken to study. The canteen was not good. Sports were not played because there was no playground on campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of faculty members, good placements, good infrastructure, facilities, etc.
reviews.review_text: The college provides 24*7 Wi-Fi. Labs are always clean and clear. Classrooms are better for studying. The library has a study environment. The quality of facilities in our hostel is very good. The quality of food is great. Food is available in the canteen. Medical facilities are always available. In front of our hostel, fields are available for playing cricket, volleyball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its teachers, infrastructure, and good placements are there for 2021 and 2022.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the course infrastructure is very good but the hostel facility is not good. Our college gives students practical knowledge. The classrooms are clean. But in the hostel, the management is not good. In the hostel, canteen food is also not good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is one of the best engineering colleges. I recommend students to study here.
reviews.review_text: The college has a library where students issue our coursebook, and there are over 2500 books. The college has 30 classrooms including an e-classroom. The college has 2 conference halls. The classroom has tables and benches and every classroom has a CCTV installed. It has a basketball court and a badminton court, and also has a cricket ground in which the pitch is made up of cement. Every year the college make an annual function but from previous 6 years, and the college is not arranging it.

reviews.review_heading: I think our college is the best for placements. I am satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: Labs and the hostels are great. In the hostels, you will surely have lots of fun with friends. The food system is the best in the college. All labs are fully functional, and it has a great lecture hall. Every classroom has new digital boards, an air-conditioner, and a projector. Medical facilities are good. There are 2 ambulances for an emergency. The canteen is clean. The canteen serves the best quality food at a reasonable price.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the placements and infrastructure of the campus. The teaching is good.
reviews.review_text: New hostels are well maintained and good at maintaining hygiene. The hostel rooms are quite comfortable compared to other engineering colleges. They give you the choice of choosing rooms, and if you want a room with an attached bathroom, the cost is more. Our hostel has a well-maintained gym.

reviews.review_heading: In this college, you will love to join, study and have a wonderful experience.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is completely Wi-Fi enabled. Labs are well operated with one computer to one student. There are centrally air-conditioned labs. Classrooms are old fashioned, but have huge space and are well ventilated. The library is accessible every day. The hostel is very good actually, and it is also completely Wi-Fi enabled. The food served here is nice.

reviews.review_heading: Decent placements offered.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, laboratory, Library, Gym, Sports area like facilities are available in our campus. Talking about the food quality, ne must say it is below average. The canteen facility is good. The medical and sports facilities are decent. This is not a sports centric institute. If you are looking for a sports centric institute, then this is not for you.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Apex Group of Institutions:

placements.overview: Apex Group of Institutions was founded in 1965. It is a private institute and is located in Jaipur, Rajasthan. Apex Group of Institutions courses are offered to students at the UG, PG and After 10th levels. The institute is approved by AICTE and CoA and offers courses in Full Time mode. Apex Group of Institutions offers a total of 14 courses in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and Architecture & Planning. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Arch and After 10th Diploma and the total seat intake for the available courses is 1374. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering and Power Engineering. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 58,500 to 3,92,500. Apart from this, the Apex Group of Institutions campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

faqs.answer:
A:    Apex Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityAfter 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th standard or equivalent with minimum 35% marks in aggregate and also must have passed science and maths subjects individually from rajasthan/cbse or equivalent board. 
No minimum age limit required.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma in engineering from
recognized University.B.ArchCandidate who have passed 10+3 Diploma Examination with Mathematics as compulsory subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate from a recognized Institute/ University can also apply.
Candidates appearing for 10+3 Diploma with Mathematics in the current year may also provisionally appear for NATA-2023.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E. or B.Tech in Computer / Information Technology, MCA (mathematics as optional in UG)/M.Sc.(Info. Tech.)/M.Sc. (Computer Science,Electronics and Communication) from RTU or any other recognized University/Institution or any other examinations recognized as equivalent thereto by the competent authority.
Candidate must have min. 50% (6.25 CGPA on 10 points scale and equivalent) marks in the qualifying degree examination (45% or 5.75 CGPA on 10 points scale of relaxation is admissible for SC/ST candidates).

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, this is an average college where you can only complete your degree.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 40% of the students get placed. Civil engineering is good for future placements. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Lab, and library conditions are good. Mess and canteen are clean and well managed. There are some extracurricular activities organised from time to time. Sports playground condition is good. There are some Olympiad exams also organised sometimes.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful and well qualified. They have greater degrees like M.Tech and Ph.D. The course curriculum is relevant. Sometimes semesters are easy and sometimes not. You can feel sometimes boring at college because of the environment. If you like a funky atmosphere then avoid admission.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Our college infrastructure is good and teacher's teaching quality is also good.

review_content.Placements: Around 50% of students were placed. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA, and the average salary pacakge offered was 3.5 LPA. The lowest salary pacakge offered was 2 LPA. Maruti Suzuki and Bosh Jaipur were the top recruiting companies. An evergreen branch always demands in companies, and it was a core branch of technology help of this students can design a new size and shapes machines.
review_content.Infrastructure: There were great infrastructure with a Wi-Fi campus, laboratories, and classrooms better were looking. The library was good with several books available for reading. Hostal facilities were also better as college students eat many of times food in mess, but it was of medium quality. On Sunday they give students special food, if students want to eat junk food. There was a canteen available. For sports, badminton courts, basketball, volleyball, and indoor-outdoor games were available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: You will never regret taking admission here.

review_content.Placements: About 89% of students got placed from our course. It is a very good college with amazing placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: It is a very nice campus, and sports activities are awesome. Apex Foundation is being recognised and affiliated with lots of authorities and serves society with a world-class infrastructure and quality education. Sanjay Shiksha Samiti launched Apex University (AU), Jaipur, with its heritage of excellence in education for over 53 years. Our university was established by Rajasthan State Legislature Act No.27 of 2018. The main campus of the university is spread over 30 acres of area in an eco-friendly environment at Achrol.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure is good, and the faculty are well-qualified.

review_content.Placements: Students who want to continue in this field got placed. There is no actual package for the architecture course, as it is based on your understanding and skills in this field. Gaining practical knowledge is essential as you have to work on-site and also off-site.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities in our college are good. As I am a day scholar, I don't know much about the hostel, but the infrastructure of our hostel and college is good. I don't know about the hostel food, but the college has a canteen, and the food is good there. The college canteen is common for faculty and students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: The architecture is a pretty good course if you ignore the placements and salary issues.

review_content.Placements: I think architecture is the only course in which placements are not conducted. We have to look for internships and jobs on our own. None of the students get placed from our batch or from other batches of B.Arch. Only the lowest salary package is offered because students sometimes work for free for experience, and this is how this industry work, which is wrong.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is worst here, like a studio, canteen, hostel, and mess. We found cockroaches in our hostel food sometimes. The infrastructure of the hostel and the college is so bad. There are no sports or games facilities. Events are conducted yearly, but college management does not support us for one annual function. The hostel and mess are the worst, including food.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Architecture is pretty good if you ignore placements and salary issues in this line of work.

review_content.Placements: I think architecture is the only course where placements are not conducted. There are small firms in architecture, and architects are operating their own firms. None of the students got placed from our college in any of the architectural firms. We searched for training on our own. Even jobs can't offer enough amount of salary as small firms are available.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything was worse here like a studio, canteen, hostel and mess. We find cockroaches in our hostel food sometimes. The infrastructure was very bad in the hostel and the college. There were no sports or games. Events used to be organised yearly, but the college management doesn't support us for one annual function. The hostel and mess were the worst part, including food.

faqs.answer: Apex Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityAfter 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th standard or equivalent with minimum 35% marks in aggregate and also must have passed science and maths subjects individually from rajasthan/cbse or equivalent board. No minimum age limit required.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma in engineering from recognized University.B.ArchCandidate who have passed 10+3 Diploma Examination with Mathematics as compulsory subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate from a recognized Institute/ University can also apply. Candidates appearing for 10+3 Diploma with Mathematics in the current year may also provisionally appear for NATA-2023.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E. or B.Tech in Computer / Information Technology, MCA (mathematics as optional in UG)/M.Sc.(Info. Tech.)/M.Sc. (Computer Science,Electronics and Communication) from RTU or any other recognized University/Institution or any other examinations recognized as equivalent thereto by the competent authority. Candidate must have min. 50% (6.25 CGPA on 10 points scale and equivalent) marks in the qualifying degree examination (45% or 5.75 CGPA on 10 points scale of relaxation is admissible for SC/ST candidates). Candidates with qualifications obtained through examinations conducted by professional societies recognized by MHRD/UGC/AIU/UPSC/AICTE {e.g. AMIE by Institute of Engineers (India); AMICE by Institute of Civil Engineers (India); IEE} as equivalent to B.E./B.Tech. are also eligible. Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.

overview_faqs.answer: Apex Group of Institutions is a reputed institute for After 1th Diploma, B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Arch, M.E./M.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies, Architecture & Planning. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Apex Group of Institutions has a review rating of 2.9 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 2.9 on campuslife, 2.4 on placements, 3.1 on faculty and 3.2 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Apex Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Overall, this is an average college where you can only complete your degree.

content.Placements: Approximately 40% of the students get placed. Civil engineering is good for future placements. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Lab, and library conditions are good. Mess and canteen are clean and well managed. There are some extracurricular activities organised from time to time. Sports playground condition is good. There are some Olympiad exams also organised sometimes.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful and well qualified. They have greater degrees like M.Tech and Ph.D. The course curriculum is relevant. Sometimes semesters are easy and sometimes not. You can feel sometimes boring at college because of the environment. If you like a funky atmosphere then avoid admission.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Our college infrastructure is good and teacher's teaching quality is also good.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students were placed. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA, and the average salary pacakge offered was 3.5 LPA. The lowest salary pacakge offered was 2 LPA. Maruti Suzuki and Bosh Jaipur were the top recruiting companies. An evergreen branch always demands in companies, and it was a core branch of technology help of this students can design a new size and shapes machines.
content.Infrastructure: There were great infrastructure with a Wi-Fi campus, laboratories, and classrooms better were looking. The library was good with several books available for reading. Hostal facilities were also better as college students eat many of times food in mess, but it was of medium quality. On Sunday they give students special food, if students want to eat junk food. There was a canteen available. For sports, badminton courts, basketball, volleyball, and indoor-outdoor games were available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: You will never regret taking admission here.

content.Placements: About 89% of students got placed from our course. It is a very good college with amazing placements.
content.Infrastructure: It is a very nice campus, and sports activities are awesome. Apex Foundation is being recognised and affiliated with lots of authorities and serves society with a world-class infrastructure and quality education. Sanjay Shiksha Samiti launched Apex University (AU), Jaipur, with its heritage of excellence in education for over 53 years. Our university was established by Rajasthan State Legislature Act No.27 of 2018. The main campus of the university is spread over 30 acres of area in an eco-friendly environment at Achrol.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is good, and the faculty are well-qualified.

content.Placements: Students who want to continue in this field got placed. There is no actual package for the architecture course, as it is based on your understanding and skills in this field. Gaining practical knowledge is essential as you have to work on-site and also off-site.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities in our college are good. As I am a day scholar, I don't know much about the hostel, but the infrastructure of our hostel and college is good. I don't know about the hostel food, but the college has a canteen, and the food is good there. The college canteen is common for faculty and students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: The architecture is a pretty good course if you ignore the placements and salary issues.

content.Placements: I think architecture is the only course in which placements are not conducted. We have to look for internships and jobs on our own. None of the students get placed from our batch or from other batches of B.Arch. Only the lowest salary package is offered because students sometimes work for free for experience, and this is how this industry work, which is wrong.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is worst here, like a studio, canteen, hostel, and mess. We found cockroaches in our hostel food sometimes. The infrastructure of the hostel and the college is so bad. There are no sports or games facilities. Events are conducted yearly, but college management does not support us for one annual function. The hostel and mess are the worst, including food.

admission_process.title: Apex Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Apex Group of Institutions admission 2025 is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The institute considers scores in JEE Main, GATE, and CAT, etc. for admission. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in several specialisations.Apex Group of Institutionsoffers After 10th Diploma and B.Arch at UG level and M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM at the PG level.
Aspirants who are selected for admission need to pay the course fees. The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 58,500 - 3,92,500. Aspirants have to payINR 1,28,500 - 1,61,500for PG courses.

We have found cockroaches in our food in the mess, ducting in the hostel doesn't work many times, even the drinking water was so pure that I got ill due to it. And spend my 3 months at my home away from college.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities and infrastruce is the minus point but faculty members were good.
reviews.review_text: Everything was worse - studio, canteen, hostel, mess. Find cockroaches in our hostel food sometimes. Infrastructure was so bad of the hostel and the college. There was no sports or games available. Events use to happen yearly but college management don't support us for one annual function. Hostel and mess were the worst part including food .

reviews.review_heading: It is the best MBA college in Mansarover, Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi, library, meeting hall, and a huge football ground. The infrastructure is very hygienic and good. Many occasions are also celebrated in this college, and the faculty members are very good and helpful. The college has an auditorium and separate libraries. Parking areas are available inside the college, so no need to worry about it.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure, spacious building and experienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The building of our college is spacious and luxurious, and it also has a good ground. Facilities in our college are Wi-Fi labs, spacious classrooms, a library, hostel, mess, computer labs, Wi-Fi enabled campus and a sports ground with all sports equipment. All of the facilities in our college are top class, and everything is available in our college. The computer science department has Wi-Fi and enough computers for all the students. The mechanical department has all of the machinery which is ne...

reviews.review_heading: I had overall good experience in infrastructure but not for placements.
reviews.review_text: The ambience of classrooms is good, and the library has a huge collection of books, and there is no hostel facility. The campus is not huge, but overall it was fine. So I would like to suggest you to take admission in this college.

highlights.summary:
The TG ICET 2026 registration process has started for admission to MBA and MCA courses. Students will be able to register themselves till Mar 16, 2026, without a late fee. The exam will be conducted on May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Below are a few more updates related to the School of Management Studies, Guru Nanak Institutions Technical Campus:

placements.overview:
The TG ICET 2026 registration process has started for admission to MBA and MCA courses. Students will be able to register themselves till Mar 16, 2026, without a late fee. The exam will be conducted on May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Located in Ranga Reddy, Telangana, the School of Management Studies, Guru Nanak Institutions Technical Campus is a premier institute in higher education. The institute was established in 2005 and offers PG courses in full-time mode in the form of Degree and Diploma programmes. MBA/PGDM programmes are the most popular offerings of the School of Management Studies, Guru Nanak Institutions Technical Campus. Students can choose from these AICTE approved programs to pursue their careers in higher studies. The institute offers programmes in the streams of Business and Management Studies. The institute has an intake capacity of 120 seats for all of its programmes. School of Management Studies, Guru Nanak Institutions Technical Campus also boasts a well-supported campus with facilities for an enriching learning experience.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Management - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Guru Nanak provides you with everything, it is in the way you utilise.

review_content.Placements: Firstly, talking about the percentage of students placed in my course is very low 10% because drives have been started so lately for the batch, especially as we know the current situations outside, with many layoffs, only a few companies are visiting college, many yet come in further months. The highest package is about 32LPA last year, this year, 20LPA till now from my course. The top companies are TCS, IBM, WIPRO, AMEZON, and TECH MAHENDRA. Recently, nearly 700 students got internship for the VISWAM AI summer internship, and I am one of them. Software developer, Data Analyst, and Science, Full Stack development, web development.

faqs.answer:
A:    Anurag College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma in Engineering /B.Sc from recognised University.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed graduation from any recognised universityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have passed with minimum 50% Marks in Bachelor degree (B.E./B.Tech) in relevant discipline from a recognised Institute/University or on the merit in GATE/PGECET.After 10th DiplomaCandidates must have passed 10th examination conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or from any other recognised board in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects, and obtained at least 35% marks in the qualifying examination.
Candidate must have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% Marks in each subject.
Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in March/April-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared are also eligible.

review_summary.college_name: Anurag College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Placements are not available in our college.

content.Placements: Fifty percent of students are placed in the EEE department. L&T company recruits the top students, and all other companies participate in the placement. PLC SCADA and designing have the highest package of 12 LPAand the lowest package is 4 LPA. Forty-five percent of students are placed in L&T company.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, there is no compound wall, so it is an advantage. Latecomers and no dress code are followed. College classrooms are very clean and neat, and blackboards are very visible to every corner of students. Wi-Fi facilities are only for staff.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It was a good college but now, it has become an agricultural university.

content.Placements: Around 30% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA and the lowest salary package is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, Wipro, TCS, and Accenture. Internships are not provided in our college. Top roles offered are software developer and engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Labs were good and regularly conducted. Library consists of all the books. Classrooms are good. Hostel food is good. Medical facilities are available but games are not available.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college were somewhat helpful. The course curriculum was good and understandable. Semester exams were good. The pass percentage was 40%.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good infrastructure and placements.

content.Placements: At our college, almost all students are placed. The lowest salary package offered is 4.5 LPA. Top roles offered are machine learning and data analysis.
content.Infrastructure: Labs were available. Sports facilities are available. Our teachers encourage students in sports.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are helpful. Exams are conducted weekly to improve students' study habits and skills in the coming stages. The pass percentage is 70%.
content.Other: I chose this course because I have learned new things in CSE.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied as ours will be the final batch.

content.Placements: Placements are not very high because of less students in our college. Percentage of placement in our college is around 60 percent. Recently, the highest package given was INR 8L per annum and the lowest package was of INR 2.6L per annum. Recruiting companies are Wipro, TCS, tata. Around 40 percent of students got internship from ECE department. Top roles offered in our course are of technical support supervisor.
content.Infrastructure: Our college facilities and infrastructure available for our course are digital classrooms, Wi-Fi, computers labs and machine labs. There is no college hostel and some of our students stay in private hostels. Sports and games are available but only cricket and volleyball.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with placements.

content.Placements: Maybe 30% students were placed. The highest package was 4.5 LPA and the least was 1.8 LPA. Indian navy, TCS, Cognizant, etc. are the top recruiters. 80% students got internship and that too in core companies, but failed to provide placements in core companies. Companies like amritha tool crafts, range engine valves, etc. visit here.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average. We had each and every lab of respective subject. We had a good library. The quality of food is good at times but it is very bad sometimes. We have a readers' shop from where we can buy all the bakery items, junk food, soft drinks and all the stationery items.

admission_process.title: Anurag College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Anurag College of Engineering admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Anurag College of Engineeringoffers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 1,50,000 - 2,80,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

Candidates are not required to appear for any entrance exams as the admission process is merit-based. hostel_campus.college_name: Anurag College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not available in our college.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there is no compound wall, so it is an advantage. Latecomers and no dress code are followed. College classrooms are very clean and neat, and blackboards are very visible to every corner of students. Wi-Fi facilities are only for staff.

reviews.review_heading: It was a good college but now, it has become an agricultural university.
reviews.review_text: Labs were good and regularly conducted. Library consists of all the books. Classrooms are good. Hostel food is good. Medical facilities are available but games are not available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: Labs were available. Sports facilities are available. Our teachers encourage students in sports.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied as ours will be the final batch.
reviews.review_text: Our college facilities and infrastructure available for our course are digital classrooms, Wi-Fi, computers labs and machine labs. There is no college hostel and some of our students stay in private hostels. Sports and games are available but only cricket and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average. We had each and every lab of respective subject. We had a good library. The quality of food is good at times but it is very bad sometimes. We have a readers' shop from where we can buy all the bakery items, junk food, soft drinks and all the stationery items.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are very helpful.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not at all there for all the computers except for few systems. Students do not have access to Wi-Fi. Labs are there but they are not fully functional. Most of the computers don't even work. For those systems that work are included with the required software. No hostel is available for the boys students. An hostel is there for the girls. Boys attend the college from the private hostel that are available nearby.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with this college because of placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college environment is neat. The library is available in our college, and it contains all books for students to study. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. Labs are well-equipped. The hostel facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placements, good faculty, good infrastructure and facilities etc.
reviews.review_text: It was nice with good environment, they provide a healthy atmosphere in classrooms, libraries, and labs. College environment was neat and clean, there were all books in library, for agriculture students there were field work also. Labs are quite good all systems works good. All electrical labs are good with equipment .

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good and provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The library was well-equipped with all facilities and many books. Our college has many hostels for boys and girls. All hostels were very good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs and classrooms are good in the college. Quality is good of hostel with homely food and good cultural life style. The college maintains good women empowerment. Well maintained labs are present in the college.

reviews.review_heading: I was absolutely satisfied with the college because of faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was not bad. On our campus, we had a well-maintained sanitary. We had a Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms were well maintained and we had a very good spacious library. We did not have any hostel on our campus. We had a spacious canteen and good ground.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I am just satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The labs and classrooms are good but not very good because some of the equipment in labs do not work well. There is no canteen as of now. All the other facilities are comparatively good. The library is good and has almost all types of books.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides excellent teachers, good atmospheric environment, and good placements.
reviews.review_text: In this college, laboratories are provided, and in workshop there are 100 students. It provides a large auditorium. It has library with large collection of many different books and articles. The environment is also eco-friendly. Hostel facility for girls is also available. Transport facility is available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is average and has good surrounding but not good faculty and placements are good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our department are average. We have labs, a library, and equipment that are good in our college. We have a Wi-Fi facility for every department. Sports meets are conducted and we have a sports room where all indoor and outdoor required equipment are available.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college because of its facilities, fests, etc.
reviews.review_text: The facilities were good for teaching, and the laboratories are good but not much high level in our college. The library facility was also there, and there was no Wi-Fi connection. There was no hostel facility and good sports were played in our college.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a average college but with good reputation and studies.

review_content.Placements: In my class there are about 60-70 students and the study is also average. I don't know about the packages offered here as I have never seen it nor about the companies that come to recruit here. Our course basically offers banking roles or you can say business or financing roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided by our college is average. Infrastructure of our college is also not very good as it is very old college. Classrooms are mostly clean but no facility of Wi-Fi in the campus except for the students residing in the campus hostel. Canteen is private and it's food is also average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for learning in Gurdaspur.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good in CSE, no one is in ECE the only other available branch for B.Tech on our campus. For placements, our campus students go to GNDU Amritsar. So students get the opportunity to get placed in companies that come to hire students. TCS is the main recruiter. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 2.4 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good as in government colleges, not as good as private colleges. Hostels are good and not costly. Wi-Fi is available for hostelers only in hostels. Computer laboratories, classrooms, and library are also good. The canteen is also good but it is not large. Sports and games events are conducted but only once a year.

review_summary.college_name: Guru Nanak Dev University Regional Campus, Gurdaspur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good ground and computer lab. Bad below average Placement in 2022.

content.Placements: 25 percentage of student were placed from our college. The lowest package is 3.50 LPA, average package is 5 LPA and the highest package is 17 LPA. 20 percent of student get internship. TCS, Accenture, Infosys, Josh etc. companies visit to our college. Junior engineer, database manager, full stack developer are roles that offer by our course.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi access only give to hostel student, Labs have a new computer. Grounds are good but sweepers not regularly clean the ground it only cleans when there is any festival in college. Library is clean and have a lots of books that you should read. Canteen's condition is average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: This college has a good environment and provides experienced staff.

content.Placements: Our college placements department is the best. Better placements opportunities are provided with better support and help. Placements offers are provided through email to the students via groups made by this university staff. If students want better placements opportunity, then they should score at least 7 CGPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure in the hostel is in good condition. Students do not have to care about the furniture, it is provided by the hostel authorities. Students cannot take electronics appliances for cooking or iron with them except a kettle to make maggi, tea, coffee, rice, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Jun-2025) - Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a average college but with good reputation and studies.

content.Placements: In my class there are about 60-70 students and the study is also average. I don't know about the packages offered here as I have never seen it nor about the companies that come to recruit here. Our course basically offers banking roles or you can say business or financing roles.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided by our college is average. Infrastructure of our college is also not very good as it is very old college. Classrooms are mostly clean but no facility of Wi-Fi in the campus except for the students residing in the campus hostel. Canteen is private and it's food is also average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for learning in Gurdaspur.

content.Placements: Placements are good in CSE, no one is in ECE the only other available branch for B.Tech on our campus. For placements, our campus students go to GNDU Amritsar. So students get the opportunity to get placed in companies that come to hire students. TCS is the main recruiter. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 2.4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good as in government colleges, not as good as private colleges. Hostels are good and not costly. Wi-Fi is available for hostelers only in hostels. Computer laboratories, classrooms, and library are also good. The canteen is also good but it is not large. Sports and games events are conducted but only once a year.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It has a good environment, education, and placements.

content.Placements: The placements provided by our university are up to the mark. Our seniors get placed in very good companies like TCS, TCS Ninja, Wipro, Nagar, Accenture, etc. Around 80% of students get placed in the previous year. Various roles offered are software development engineer, data engineer, and Network Engineer in well-known companies.
content.Infrastructure: Bhai Gurdas library is huge, and a large number of books is provided by this university. Wi-Fi facility is also provided to the students in the laboratories. There is a total of three laboratories in the B.Tech CSE department with a basic internet connection facility and desktop systems. Hostel rooms are also good. Various extracurricular activities are also associated with the teachers and students consecutively.

faqs.question: I have completed my Class 12 from PCB stream, can I get admission to BTech at Guru Nanak Dev University Regional Campus?
faqs.answer: No, candidates are not allowed to get admissions into BTech at Guru Nanak Dev University Regional Campus after completing Class 12 from the PCB stream. Because the primary eligibility requirement to get admission into BTech courses is that candidates must complete their Class 12 from the PCM stream with a minimum aggregate of 50%. Additionally, for the selection process, the college accepts relevant scores from JEE Mains, followed by a counselling process.

faqs.question: Will Punjab Board conduct the PSEB 12th supplementary exams for all subjects?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Board conducts PSEB 12th supplementary exam for the subjects which students are not able to clear. PSEB Class 12 supplementary exams will likely be held in August.Students who are unable to clear their PSEB Class 12 exams in one or two subjects and those who wish to improve their marks can apply and appear for the supplementary/improvement exams.

placement_data.title: Guru Nanak Dev University Regional Campus, Gurdaspur Placement overview
paragraphs: Guru Nanak Dev University Gurdaspur has a well-developed placements cell that assures the continuity of the learning process and employment at the campus and words in a centralised manner across all the departments. It not only conducts recruitment drives for its students but also organises numerous training sessions to prepare them to face the competitive work outside the campus.
Over the years, many well-known companies have hired the students of this University. These include Capgemini, TCS, John Deere, Mind Infotech, Nagarro and Infogain, among others.

Consistent placements of students from this campus of GNDU has always been a distinguished feature of it. A few highlights drawn from the verified students’ reviews on Shiksha around GNDU Gurdaspur placements are as follows:
As per the placement reports available on the official website of GNDU Gurdaspur, a few companies who have hired the students of BTech and MBA (during 2016 and 2017 placements) are as follows:
Top Companies for BTech
Latest students’ reviews on GNDU Gurdaspur
Compare GNDU Gurdaspur with other universities and institutes
Admission process of GNDU Gurdaspur
Q. Does GNDU Gurdaspur have a placements cell?

A. Yes, Guru Nanak Dev University Gurdaspur has a dedicated and well organised placements cell that assures the continuity of the learning process and employment at the campus. Working in a centralised manner across all the departments, it not only conducts recruitment drives for its students but also organises numerous training sessions to prepare them to face the competitive work outside the campus.
Q. How is GNDU Gurdaspur in terms of placements?
A. As per a few students' reviews on Shiksha, 60-80% of students from every batch get placement opportunities via this University campus making it a decent choice in terms of placements.
Q. What is the salary package offered to MBA students at GNDU Gurdaspur?
A. As per the details fetched from the verified students' reviews on Shiksha, the salary offered to MBA students range from Rs 3-7 LPA.
Q. Who are the major recruiters at GNDU Gurdaspur?

A. Over the years, many reputed companies have offered placements opportunities to the students of this University, which include Capgemini, TCS, John Deere, Mind Infotech, Nagarro and Infogain, among others.
Q. What is the average package offered for BTech at GNDU Gurdaspur?
A. The average salary offered to BTech students range between Rs 3-3.5 LPA as per the students' reviews mentioned on Shiksha.
Q. What is the highest salary offered in the recent placements?
A. Many recent reviews on Shiksha mention that a few BTech students were offered the highest package up to Rs 14-15 LPA.
