hostel_campus.college_name: Guru Nanak Dev University Regional Campus

hostel.description:
Wi-Fi Internet connectivity is provided in both the boys and girls hostels. One Internet Lab is provided in girl hostel for working in evening hours.
The Wi-Fi enabled Boys' Hostel has the capacity to accommodate 704 students, to be distributed in Five Blocks having 356 cubical rooms. There are 179 rooms having intake capacity of 470 girls. 

The accommodation offered includes two seated, four seated and five seated rooms. The hostel is well-equipped with facilities like internet with wi-fi, medical room, utility shop, photostat, PCO-cum-stationary store, general store, reading hall, mess, canteen, etc. The hostel blocks have geysers and water coolers with filters. The hostel also has well furnished common room with facilities like L.E.D TV with Dish connection. Leading newspapers and magazines in Punjabi, Hindi and English are subscribed and issued to the students on request.

There is provision for indoor and outdoor games like Carom, Badminton and Table Tennis for
the residents. The hostel has lush green lawns with benches for sitting.

To ensure the safety and security of the residents, the hostel entrance and boundaries are
under 24 hrs CCTV surveillance. In addition to this, the hostel is manned by female attendants
and women night guards. Every effort is made to make the stay of residents comfortable,
enjoyable and fruitful.

library.description:
The University Library has a collection of about 5,11,432 documents and a subscription to various articles, magazines and newspapers for the students. Every Department has a separate library for the benefit of students.

The main library is well connected with INFLIBNET, DELNET and Legal Software available on the website www.highcourtchd.gov.in, www.eCourts.gov.in.

There is a separate air-conditioned reading hall which remains open round the clock. The library has been organized into different sections such as Acquisition, Technical, Reference, Periodical, Circulation, Rare Book Section, Theses/Dissertation and Punjabi Reference Library, Electronic Theses/Dissertation Lab., Digital Lab., Computer Section and Binding.

The University Library subscribes to 138 Indian, 64 foreign journals, 24 popular magazines and 23 newspapers. More than 150 journals/periodicals are received as gift. 

Library is also getting access to 169 e-journals and 9000 conference proceedings through a package (IEEE ASPP+POP) for Electronics Technology department, Computer Science department & Computer Engineering & Technology department.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Volleyball Court, Handball Court

library.description:
The University Library has a collection of about 5,11,432 documents and a subscription to various articles, magazines and newspapers for the students. Every Department has a separate library for the benefit of students.

The main library is well connected with INFLIBNET, DELNET and Legal Software available on the website www.highcourtchd.gov.in, www.eCourts.gov.in.

There is a separate air-conditioned reading hall which remains open round the clock. The library has been organized into different sections such as Acquisition, Technical, Reference, Periodical, Circulation, Rare Book Section, Theses/Dissertation and Punjabi Reference Library, Electronic Theses/Dissertation Lab., Digital Lab., Computer Section and Binding.

The University Library subscribes to 138 Indian, 64 foreign journals, 24 popular magazines and 23 newspapers. More than 150 journals/periodicals are received as gift. 

Library is also getting access to 169 e-journals and 9000 conference proceedings through a package (IEEE ASPP+POP) for Electronics Technology department, Computer Science department & Computer Engineering & Technology department.

hostel.description:
Wi-Fi Internet connectivity is provided in both the boys and girls hostels. One Internet Lab is provided in girl hostel for working in evening hours.
The Wi-Fi enabled Boys' Hostel has the capacity to accommodate 704 students, to be distributed in Five Blocks having 356 cubical rooms. There are 179 rooms having intake capacity of 470 girls. 

The accommodation offered includes two seated, four seated and five seated rooms. The hostel is well-equipped with facilities like internet with wi-fi, medical room, utility shop, photostat, PCO-cum-stationary store, general store, reading hall, mess, canteen, etc. The hostel blocks have geysers and water coolers with filters. The hostel also has well furnished common room with facilities like L.E.D TV with Dish connection. Leading newspapers and magazines in Punjabi, Hindi and English are subscribed and issued to the students on request.

There is provision for indoor and outdoor games like Carom, Badminton and Table Tennis for
the residents. The hostel has lush green lawns with benches for sitting.

To ensure the safety and security of the residents, the hostel entrance and boundaries are
under 24 hrs CCTV surveillance. In addition to this, the hostel is manned by female attendants
and women night guards. Every effort is made to make the stay of residents comfortable,
enjoyable and fruitful.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Volleyball Court, Handball Court

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electronics Lab, Language Lab, Physics Lab, Electronic Devices and Circuits Lab, Communication System Lab, Digital Electronic Lab, Analog Integrated Circuits Lab, Microprocessor Lab, Digital Signal Processing Lab, Microwave Lab, Electronic Measuring Instrument Lab, PCB Lab

reviews.review_heading: Good ground and computer lab. Bad below average Placement in 2022.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi access only give to hostel student, Labs have a new computer. Grounds are good but sweepers not regularly clean the ground it only cleans when there is any festival in college. Library is clean and have a lots of books that you should read. Canteen's condition is average.

reviews.review_heading: This college has a good environment and provides experienced staff.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in the hostel is in good condition. Students do not have to care about the furniture, it is provided by the hostel authorities. Students cannot take electronics appliances for cooking or iron with them except a kettle to make maggi, tea, coffee, rice, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is a average college but with good reputation and studies.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by our college is average. Infrastructure of our college is also not very good as it is very old college. Classrooms are mostly clean but no facility of Wi-Fi in the campus except for the students residing in the campus hostel. Canteen is private and it's food is also average.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for learning in Gurdaspur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good as in government colleges, not as good as private colleges. Hostels are good and not costly. Wi-Fi is available for hostelers only in hostels. Computer laboratories, classrooms, and library are also good. The canteen is also good but it is not large. Sports and games events are conducted but only once a year.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good environment, education, and placements.
reviews.review_text: Bhai Gurdas library is huge, and a large number of books is provided by this university. Wi-Fi facility is also provided to the students in the laboratories. There is a total of three laboratories in the B.Tech CSE department with a basic internet connection facility and desktop systems. Hostel rooms are also good. Various extracurricular activities are also associated with the teachers and students consecutively.

reviews.review_heading: This college was average for study. The quality of education provided was also decent.
reviews.review_text: I never stayed in the hostels, but a few of my friends stayed. Quality food was served here, and the infrastructure was well built. There was a good environment. Facilities like canteen and medical were good. Wi-Fi facility was also provided by the college properly.

reviews.review_heading: It is better than most of the colleges around our area.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a very good library for studying. It is fully air-conditioned, and almost every book is available. There is a Wi-Fi facility, and labs are also available for the respective course. Quality of the hostel is also very good. Food served is average, but canteens serve some good food.

reviews.review_heading: Most of the students placed in reputed companies with salaries offered are range between 3.5-8LPA.
reviews.review_text: Well maintained labs, facilities for sports students. No issues regarding any infrastructure. The canteen and hostel food are much better than other colleges. The hostel rooms are clean. Labs are very big and there are around 30-40 computers in each lab with full AC.

reviews.review_heading: GNDU is the best university in Punjab region.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our campus is good. The plus point of our campus is the availability of proper sports facilities and well-maintained labs for IT students. The university will assuredly look into the problems related to infrastructure, and every candidate will be able to avail good facilities on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best university in Gurdaspur.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very well maintained. But there is only one canteen in whole campus which gets really messy. The overall experience is very good. Computer labs are well-equipped and whole campus has Wi-Fi connection for students as well as teachers. There are AC libraries open during college hours for students.

reviews.review_heading: A review of Guru Nanak Dev University Regional Campus, Gurdaspur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of college is quite good having lots of labs with proper equipment. As for computer science students, 3 different labs are provided with full Wi-Fi access on the campus, and for electronics students, different MATLAB labs are provided for the completion of their projects.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty was good and one can be satisfied with the college
reviews.review_text: Our college has labs and has Wi-Fi access both on the campus and hostel. It has a library also, which is separate for engineering, MBA, and law students. The quality of food is average. Accommodation in the hostel is in 3 blocks, and the rooms are large. I didn't face any issue related to the infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best engineering colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. We have programming labs, database labs, internet lab and those are well-equipped with the latest computer technology. We also have a library with the latest books. College also has a canteen. Canteen area is quite good, they provide good and hygienic food.

reviews.review_heading: The university is good for the placement and teaching.
reviews.review_text: The university has a good, neat and clean classroom and separates buildings for the law, B.Tech, commerce, MBA. The university has proper labs for the computer science and electronic labs. The university has proper libraries for B.Tech, law, MBA and commerce in their respective buildings. The university has proper ground for cricket, football, baseball, basketball and badminton.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied, but the course curriculum must be updated with what companies are looking for.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good. Labs were well-maintained, and classrooms were big enough to accommodate the batch. The only problem was the availability of air-conditioners in classrooms. Wi-Fi was good with great speed, but the only drawback was that students were allowed to use it after college hours, which made it difficult to search for something during college hours.

review_content.Placements: Almost 62 % of the students or less than that get placed in our course. The highest salary offered was Rs. 60,000 per month and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 15,000 per month. The average salary offered was Rs. 33,000 per month. highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Nirwan University:

college_info.intro: Nirwan University provides various undergraduate, postgraduate, and integrated courses. NUJ provides programs in the stream of engineering, pharmacy, management, computer science and humanities. The flagship programmes include BTech and BPharm. Some of the courses provided by the university include BTech, MBA, MSc, PGDCA, BPT, BSc, BA LLB and others. Below are the Nirwan University popular programmes:

faqs.answer: A:    Nirwan University experiences moderately competitive admission. While the degree of competition might be different for all the various courses, applicants need to satisfy certain eligibility conditions before entering undergraduate and postgraduate programs. The major portion of UG admissions is done based on the candidate's performance in All India Common Entrance Examination or Nirwan University Entrance Examination. PG admissions for the MBA similarly require entrance exam scores. In addition, a few seats are reserved for the students who belong to the Rajasthan state, therefore it is not too competitive at this level. Admission process: document verification and interview rounds
faqs.question: Is Nirwan University hard to get?

faqs.answer: A:    Usually these documents are required for admission to Nirwan University:Date of birth proofClass 10+2 mark sheet for UG Courses or Degree certificate for PG coursesTransfer and Migration CertificateEntrance exam score card, if issuedDomicile certificate for students belonging to the state of Rajasthan.Passport size photographsCopy of Aadhar Card.These documents become necessary for establishing eligibility and to complete the admission process. Still, seek advice from the admission office of the university for the requirements that may have been amended or are additional in nature.
faqs.question: What are the documents required for admission to Nirwan University?

faqs.answer: A:    Nirwan University provides various UG courses. Some popular UG courses with their fee structure are as follows:UG CourseTotal Tuition FeesBPTINR 1.8 LacsBTechINR 2.6 Lacs - INR 4 LacsBCAINR 75 K - INR 2 LacsBComINR 30 KBBAINR 60 K
faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at Nirwan University?

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA course at Nirwan University?

reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and facilities are available at Nirwan University.

review_content.Placements: Nirwan University is offering good placements and internship opportunities to the MBA course students. The average percentage of students placed in our course is 30-40%. The average package offered lies between 4-9 LPA. Various marketing and sales companies visit our college for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Nirwan University has a good infrastructure for our course. All the students are provided with necessary facilities. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, sports, and various other facilities are available for the students. Hostel facilities are also available, and the conditions in the hostel are good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduation Diploma in Computer Application (PGDCA) - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Average experience but satisfied.

review_content.Placements: Placements in this college are best known, as they placed approximately 70% of their students in high-tech profile jobs like Analyst, Hardware Engineer, and Data Scientist. Top companies that came for recruitment include TCS, Tesla, JIO, and many more. About 40% of students get internships also.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is also good. They provide clean classrooms, and the library facility is good. The food in the canteen is good. Labs are in good condition, and they also provide free Wi-Fi for hostel students. The quality of facilities in the hostel is great, as there are CCTV cameras and guards.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Application (MCA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Good facilities, a lot of jobs and placements .

review_content.Placements: The college is best for jobs and placements. The percentage of students placed in our course is around 90 percent, and the top roles are system analyst, computer hardware engineer, and data analyst. The top recruiting companies are IBM, Amazon, Tech Mahindra, and the highest package is 16 LPA, while the lowest is 4 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The university boasts state of the art of facilities in equipped and modern laboratories and a comprehensive library and the hostel are good with cctv and guards are there mess food is homely food and sports grounds are there and sports are conducted twice a year .

faqs.answer: According to the Shiksha ratings, Nirwan University has been rated 4.4 out of 5 (overall). The university provides all the basic as well as modern amenities to the students. The placement and training cell helps students to prepare for interviews. The highest package offered is 18 lacs per annum, with average and the lowest packages being around 5 lacs and 3.4 lacs per annum, respectively.
faqs.question: Q: Is Nirwan University, Jaipur a good university?

faqs.answer: The MBA program at Nirwan University is one of the best courses because of its fine curriculum, industry-focused character, and excellent placement options. The course is fashioned on leadership, innovation, and strategic thinking to facilitate competencies in the students to face global business challenges. Moreover, the programs of the university also get the benefit of specialist faculty, industry collaborations, and several internships and live projects for polishing hands-on learning. To add to the mix, Nirwan University graduates receive remunerations competing with the industry, making this study program an enticing option for aspiring professionals.
faqs.question: Q: Why MBA is considered as the top course at Nirwan University?

faqs.answer: Nirwan University is considered a prestige university, especially in its variety of courses, such as engineering, management, and hospitality. The placement cell is quite strong at this university as it ensures students find a place in the most prominent firms. More than 600 students were placed in companies last year in 2022. University focuses on industry relevant education where the programs are designed according to the needs of the market. It is still relatively young, established in 2017, which must make its national rankings different compared to the older institutions. Generally speaking, it provides solid educational opportunities in technical and management fields.

overview_faqs.question: Is Nirwan University, Jaipur a good university?
overview_faqs.answer: According to the Shiksha ratings, Nirwan University has been rated 4.4 out of 5 (overall). The university provides all the basic as well as modern amenities to the students. The placement and training cell helps students to prepare for interviews. The highest package offered is 18 lacs per annum, with average and the lowest packages being around 5 lacs and 3.4 lacs per annum, respectively.

overview_faqs.question: Is Nirwan University a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Nirwan University is considered a prestige university, especially in its variety of courses, such as engineering, management, and hospitality. The placement cell is quite strong at this university as it ensures students find a place in the most prominent firms. More than 600 students were placed in companies last year in 2022. University focuses on industry relevant education where the programs are designed according to the needs of the market. It is still relatively young, established in 2017, which must make its national rankings different compared to the older institutions. Generally speaking, it provides solid educational opportunities in technical and management fields.

review_summary.college_name: Nirwan University Jaipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B. A. LLB - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: In short, Nirwan University is a mid university.

content.Placements: There are few students who got placement that too in a very low package. Most of the students who got placement were those who had some connections with the employers. Same thing goes for the internship. Although students worked under some well-known lawyers, which gave them experience.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the university and hostel is very good. There are a total of six buildings in the university. The university consists of various labs, a library, a hostel, and a hall where various functions take place. There is also a huge field in which you can play various games. Wi-Fi is okay. The food in the canteen is mid.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Sales & Marketing - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: MBA in Sales and Marketing from Nirwan University.

content.Placements: Nirwan University has decent on-campus placements every year in the MBA course. On average, around 30%-35% of students get successfully placed. The salary packages offered lie between 6 LPA-8 LPA. Most students get placed in the sales field. Internships are also provided to students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the university is good. The college campus is large with various courses available for students. Every classroom and lab has Wi-Fi connectivity. Library and various other necessary facilities are available. Sports and many extracurricular activities are also conducted at this university.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Sales & Marketing - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities are available at Nirwan University.

content.Placements: Nirwan University is offering good placements and internship opportunities to the MBA course students. The average percentage of students placed in our course is 30-40%. The average package offered lies between 4-9 LPA. Various marketing and sales companies visit our college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Nirwan University has a good infrastructure for our course. All the students are provided with necessary facilities. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, sports, and various other facilities are available for the students. Hostel facilities are also available, and the conditions in the hostel are good.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduation Diploma in Computer Application (PGDCA) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Average experience but satisfied.

content.Placements: Placements in this college are best known, as they placed approximately 70% of their students in high-tech profile jobs like Analyst, Hardware Engineer, and Data Scientist. Top companies that came for recruitment include TCS, Tesla, JIO, and many more. About 40% of students get internships also.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is also good. They provide clean classrooms, and the library facility is good. The food in the canteen is good. Labs are in good condition, and they also provide free Wi-Fi for hostel students. The quality of facilities in the hostel is great, as there are CCTV cameras and guards.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Application (MCA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Good facilities, a lot of jobs and placements .

content.Placements: The college is best for jobs and placements. The percentage of students placed in our course is around 90 percent, and the top roles are system analyst, computer hardware engineer, and data analyst. The top recruiting companies are IBM, Amazon, Tech Mahindra, and the highest package is 16 LPA, while the lowest is 4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The university boasts state of the art of facilities in equipped and modern laboratories and a comprehensive library and the hostel are good with cctv and guards are there mess food is homely food and sports grounds are there and sports are conducted twice a year .

faqs.question: Is Nirwan University hard to get?
faqs.answer: Nirwan University experiences moderately competitive admission. While the degree of competition might be different for all the various courses, applicants need to satisfy certain eligibility conditions before entering undergraduate and postgraduate programs. The major portion of UG admissions is done based on the candidate's performance in All India Common Entrance Examination or Nirwan University Entrance Examination. PG admissions for the MBA similarly require entrance exam scores. In addition, a few seats are reserved for the students who belong to the Rajasthan state, therefore it is not too competitive at this level. Admission process: document verification and interview rounds

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Nirwan University?
faqs.answer: Candidates must clear Nirwan University's entrance exam, NUCET to get admission in the university. The university conducts NUCET online for 2 hours and students qualifying for the exam are eligible to get admission.For some programs such as BE/BTech, the score of JEE Mains and JEE Advanced are accepted. For UG programs, the university accepts CUET or Class 12 merit scores.

faqs.question: How do I get admission in Nirwan University, Jaipur?
faqs.answer: To get admission in Nirwan University, Jaipur students must apply for NUCET. Nirwan University Common Eligibility Test (NUCET) is the university online entrance exam which is conducted for 2 hours. Students scoring valid scores in NUCET are eligible to get admission in Nirwan University, Jaipur. For PhD programs, the university conducts Nirwan University Research Entrance Test (NRET) or  scores from a recognised entrance exam like UGC-NET.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Nirwan University?
faqs.answer: Steps to apply for admission in Nirwan University:Ensure Eligibility: This is one where you must check if you meet the eligibility criteria as per the course that you will like to pursue (UG, PG, or integrated programs).Fill up application form: Online/Offline application form is available on the official website.Take entrance exam: If entry exam exists and required, then appear for the same entrance exam that may be CUET-PG or any university test.Submit Documents: Necessary documents will be submitted that include 10+2 mark sheets, degree certificates, and scorecards, etc.Pay All Fee: Finish all admission processes by paying fees.

reviews.review_heading: In short, Nirwan University is a mid university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university and hostel is very good. There are a total of six buildings in the university. The university consists of various labs, a library, a hostel, and a hall where various functions take place. There is also a huge field in which you can play various games. Wi-Fi is okay. The food in the canteen is mid.

reviews.review_heading: MBA in Sales and Marketing from Nirwan University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is good. The college campus is large with various courses available for students. Every classroom and lab has Wi-Fi connectivity. Library and various other necessary facilities are available. Sports and many extracurricular activities are also conducted at this university.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities are available at Nirwan University.
reviews.review_text: Nirwan University has a good infrastructure for our course. All the students are provided with necessary facilities. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, sports, and various other facilities are available for the students. Hostel facilities are also available, and the conditions in the hostel are good.

reviews.review_heading: Average experience but satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is also good. They provide clean classrooms, and the library facility is good. The food in the canteen is good. Labs are in good condition, and they also provide free Wi-Fi for hostel students. The quality of facilities in the hostel is great, as there are CCTV cameras and guards.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities, a lot of jobs and placements .

reviews.review_heading: The review of B.Sc. course in Nirwan University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for this course and hostel is excellent. Facilities and infrastructure like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries are available 24 hours a day. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is excellent. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nirwan University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the course is excellent. The hostel is good with good educational environment.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Jaipur area.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are well and good. The infrastructure like Wi-Fi facility good toilet, canteen furniture. hi-tech labs are well furnished and the hostel is good. The food served is good. We have good medical facilities. They organise yearly tournaments and many students participate in sports.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not so good. Not at all, but many facilities are available in my college. It takes money from someone else to do it.

reviews.review_heading: Best college and nice placement .

faqs.question: Q: What are the core subjects covered in M.Tech CSE program?

faqs.answer: The clear answer is no. The syllabus for MTech in Computer Science Engineering varies from one college to another. Every college abides by a certain coursework guideline decided by the college committee at the beginning of the academic year. Generally speaking, the syllabus includes some core subjects, elective subject choices, laboratory classes, and project work.Though the subjects might vary, the basic concepts taught in the classes are almost similar, covering all the fundamental knowledge and advanced-level CSE concepts that give you a comprehensive understanding of the field.

overview_faqs.question: What is unique about DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University?
overview_faqs.answer: DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University is one of the well known private university located in Kolhapur, Maharashtra, India. The university is situated around a beautiful view and surrounded by natural beauty. The university has great Infrastructures and a large campus with greenery. The aim of the university was the provide quality education to the students in the field of Agriculture and Technology. The university offers various UG and PG courses to their students in Agriculture and Technology. The university provides a great campus life to the students with all the important facilities such as a central library, a good canteen, separate hostels for boys and girls, well furnished classrooms, well maintained and clean campus and hostel rooms, laboratories, a huge cricket ground and facilities for indoor games, a good transport system etc. The university has excellent faculty members, all have well knowledge and great teaching skills. The university also provides and decent place

overview_faqs.question: How is life at DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University?
overview_faqs.answer: DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University is one of the well known private university for agriculture and technology in india. The university is situated around a scenic environment and is surrounded by natural beauty. The university has a lush green campus and great infrasturcture. The university has a great campus life. The campus is clean and well maintained. All the other facilities provided by the university are mentioned below:Separate hostels for boys and girls. review_summary.college_name: DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is good. The campus is too good, and the faculty is the best.

content.Placements: Placement of the college is 100%. 60% criteria for placement and 90% attendance are compulsory. The highest package is at LP, and the minimum package is 3 LPA. MNC companies are included. Overall, all students got internships in this college from the BCA course, and Kolhapur companies are included for internships.
content.Infrastructure: The college hostel has amazing infrastructure in the rooms and on the campus. There is an amazing infrastructure of labs, classrooms, and a library available in this college. The faculty is amazing, the hostel provides many facilities, and the food is of good quality. The canteen is good, and medical facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It's absolutely amazing to take admission here.

content.Placements: College is the best at its looks and performance. Minimum 150 students were selected for internships last year in big companies at very good package.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are very good and balanced. Hostel and mess are very good at this fee. Atmosphere of hostel is also best. All students should take admission in hostel and mess also. The atmosphere and environment surrounding hostel are amazing. I am very grateful for it. It always conducts daily activities and events like sports.
content.Faculty: Exams are conducted by two supervisors, and checking of faculty also very strict, it's good for not copying the answers. Exams are conducted with high security with a CCTV camera in each class of the university. There are 8 semesters in my course and 16 exams. Faculty of college is very good at explaining and teaching.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Some reviews mention that the mess food can be of poor quality or taste.

content.Placements: Significant percentage of students, often around 70-90% get placed. Reported the highest packages can range from 10 LPA to 20 LPA, with some even reaching 40.68 LPA for specific departments. The average salary package typically falls between 3.5 LPA to 8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are available in college, including Wi-Fi, labs, classroom, and library. Mass and canteen food quality is available. Sports and games are good. Hostels generally have well-maintained infrastructure, including spacious, clean rooms, study tables, and cupboards. Many hostels offer amenities like air conditioning, free electricity, 24X7 hot water, and internet. Security measures are in place, particularly for female students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The review of D Y Patil Agriculture and Technical Campus.

content.Placements: There are nearly 80 percent of students placed on the college campus. The highest package in this course is 27 LPA and the lowest package is 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Capgemini, Wipro, Infosys, Hexaware, etc. Nearly 80 to 90 percent of students got internships on the college campus.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. The infrastructure is very attractive. All labs and classrooms are well designed. A well-stocked library is available. A study room is also available. Good quality hostel service is provided by the college. Canteen food is of good quality. Multiple sports grounds are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of good facilities and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Government training centres are provided to the students for training and good teaching staff who are always ready to help students. Innovative ideas for teaching, field visits are done by the university. They provide training in top MNC companies. They provide training as per the student requirement.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of food and hostel is excellent. Annual sports events, cooking events, funny games, and gatherings are arranged by university staff and students. Scholarships are available for girl students in hostel fees. Students are playing in different levels in sports.

faqs.question: Is B.Tech available at D. Y. Patil Agriculture and Technical University?
faqs.answer: Yes, BTech course is available at D. Y. Patil Agriculture and Technical University. The university offers BTech courses at the UG level. Candidate must meet the eligibility criteria to enroll for BTech course admission set by the college. Aspirants must pass Class 12 with a 45% aggregate. DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University admission process is entrance-based.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission to B.Tech at DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University?
faqs.answer: To get into DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University for a BTech course, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University offers full-time BTech courses of four years' duration. Students can get into this course based on a valid PERA/CET/JEE /DYP-ATU CET exam score. Apart from the selection criteria, students must pass Class 12 (common eligibility).

faqs.question: What is the total fee for BCom at DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University?
faqs.answer: TheDY Patil Agriculture and Technical University BCom feeis INR 30,000 for each year. Thus, the fee for three years of course duration amounts to INR 90,000, However, this fee doesn’t comprise other components such as hostel fees, transport fees. Opting for those amenities may cost extra.Note:The above-mentioned fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is, however, subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: When is DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University application forms out?
faqs.answer: DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University offers verious UG and PG courses so the application forms release time is different for different courses. Usually the application forms for DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University are released in the first week of January. The applications forms release time is also depends to entrance exmas. For general UG courses the application forms release time depends on CUET/ NEET/ ICAR AIEEA exams timing, usually released in the month of June-August. Similarly, for engineering UG courses the application forms release time depends on JEE Mains timing. And for PG courses the application forms release time dependa on GATE/ MHTCET MTECH exams timing, usually in the month of February-March.Please note that these dates are subject to change, it’s recommended to keep checking the university’s official website for the latest updates and for most accurate and up to date information you can contact  university's admission office.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to B.Tech at DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Anyone can get direct admission from the college from the help of Management Quota. The candidates can either contact the institution directly or use some references. Admission is also done online and on campus. The students can also get admissions using the NRI quota. The aspirant should have obtained at least 50% marks (at least 45% marks, in the case of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability candidates belonging to Maharashtra State only) in the above subjects taken together.

faqs.question: Can I join DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University directly?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can join DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University directly. To join UG courses at DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University directly after 12th, you must be from CBSE board in 12th and the eligibility criteria is 12th with minimum 50%. In DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University for most of the UG courses you can join directly with above mentioned eligibility criteria, but the only UG course that you can't join directly is BFA. To do BFA at DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University, you have to give an exam i.e. MAH AAC CET. On the basis of MAH AAC CET score you can get admission to BFA.DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University also offers PG courses that you can join directly after your graduation and the eligibility criteria is graduation with minimum 50%. But for M.Plan and  M.Tech at DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University you have to give GATE/ MHTCET MTECH any of these exams, on the basis of exam score you can get admission.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for B.Tech at DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University?
faqs.answer: As of now there are total of 10 B.Tech courses in DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University. The total seat available for B.Tech in Agriculture Engineering is 80 for the academic year 2023. But we do not get to see any specific information about the seat intake for other B.Tech courses at DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University. The seat availability may vary from year to year and it may depends upon no. of students applying for B.Tech courses, no. of eligible students etc. For the most accurate and up to date information it is recommended to contac admission office.

reviews.review_text: Hostels are very good and balanced. Hostel and mess are very good at this fee. Atmosphere of hostel is also best. All students should take admission in hostel and mess also. The atmosphere and environment surrounding hostel are amazing. I am very grateful for it. It always conducts daily activities and events like sports.

reviews.review_heading: Some reviews mention that the mess food can be of poor quality or taste.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are available in college, including Wi-Fi, labs, classroom, and library. Mass and canteen food quality is available. Sports and games are good. Hostels generally have well-maintained infrastructure, including spacious, clean rooms, study tables, and cupboards. Many hostels offer amenities like air conditioning, free electricity, 24X7 hot water, and internet. Security measures are in place, particularly for female students.

reviews.review_heading: The review of D Y Patil Agriculture and Technical Campus.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available all over the campus. The infrastructure is very attractive. All labs and classrooms are well designed. A well-stocked library is available. A study room is also available. Good quality hostel service is provided by the college. Canteen food is of good quality. Multiple sports grounds are available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of good facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The quality of food and hostel is excellent. Annual sports events, cooking events, funny games, and gatherings are arranged by university staff and students. Scholarships are available for girl students in hostel fees. Students are playing in different levels in sports.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college's infrastructure is very good. This college has a big campus. Wi-Fi is provided all over campus. A large capacity library is available. Study rooms are also provided. In the college hostel, all necessary facilities are provided. Multiple sports ground is available. The canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: I am a fully satisfied because of good placement, good facilities and big campus.
reviews.review_text: In each classroom, LCD TVs are there. All the classrooms are well furnished. The college provides Wi-Fi in the campus. Labs are well settled and clean. The college has a big Library and it also has a big study room and a digital library. Hostel quality is good and they provide all the facilities. Mess is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely, a good college campus.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, and library facilities are excellent. Hostel is good, but only for girls. Boys' hostel is average. Food quality is not as good as expected. Other facilities are good. There is a Future Skills Center at university. Wi-Fi is there, but at university, smartphones are not allowed.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for students.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides great infrastructure. Our campus life is good. Hostel rooms are well-furnished. Mess is very good. Our campus has good environment. Laboratories are very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a huge hostel for students. We have a good canteen. A huge cricket ground is available in our college. The food served in the canteen is good. Classrooms are spacious and equipped with Wi-Fi. The Wi-Fi speed is good.

paragraphs: FEES STRUCTURE:
Course Fees    B.Tech 1.14 Lakhs (1st Yr Fees)    M.Tech  30,374 (1st Yr Fees)    B.Tech {Lateral}          1.14 Lakhs (1st Yr Fees)     B.Arch  99,618 (1st Yr Fees)

In DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University, almost 60 percent of students got placed and the lowest package of is 2 lakhs per annum and the highest package is for 8 lacks for per annum. 50 percent of students got placed in companies like HTML, TCS, HCL, etc.

The DY Patil Agriculture and Technical University BCom fee is INR 30,000 for each year. Thus, the fee for three years of course duration amounts to INR 90,000, However, this fee doesn’t comprise other components such as hostel fees, transport fees. Opting for those amenities may cost extra.
Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is, however, subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

2. OBC category candidates get50% Tuition fee waiver.
3.Students from SC/ST/OBC classes will get concessions and receive a Government Scholarship.
4. Students who score the first rank each year will get an award.

college_info.college_name: SGIT School of Management, Sanskar Educational Group

highlights.summary: SGIT School of Management, Sanskar Educational Group, located in Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh was established in 2005. The institute offers various UG and PG programs, offered in Full Time mode. The faculty at the SGIT School of Management, Sanskar Educational Group is well-experienced with years of experience. The institute provides courses in various streams including Banking, Finance & Insurance, Business & Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce and IT & Software. SGIT School of Management, Sanskar Educational Group provides students with an opportunity to learn from skilled and experienced faculty members. The courses at SGIT School of Management, Sanskar Educational Group are approved by the AICTE. In total, the institute provides 270 seats for the students. The infrastructure at the institute is well-built with modern facilities.

placements.overview: SGIT School of Management, Sanskar Educational Group, located in Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh was established in 2005. reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: College campus is also very neat and clean and has beautiful greenery.

review_content.Placements: Our college offers a minimum 2 LPA to 8 LPA package. The highest packages are offered for BBA students. College also placed a minimum of 80% of students and many of the students get an internship in the best companies like Wipro, Google, etc. The college offers a supportive environment for both academic and personal growth.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms are very good with a facility for online teaching it is a great experience to study here. It has a great atmosphere here. Canteen is also very good on the college campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I'm absolutely satisfied with the faculty members, the campus and the seniors.

review_content.Placements: From the 3rd year of BCA only some selective students have been placed. The highest pakcage offered by college till date is 7.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies include HCL & TCS. All the students are given placements based on their good or bad academic record.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities given to us include a good quality screen projector and Speakers in classrooms and also 2 properly working ACs. The same is for COMPUTER LABS too. A Wi-Fi of Jio Company is also placed. The classrooms are properly maintained. The food available in the canteen is of good quality, fresh and delicious. Also, there are cameras placed all over the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I was a sincere student in my college.

review_content.Placements: All the students are eligible to sit for the placements but only around 30 percent got the opportunity to actually have one. Companies like Nokia, Samsung, Tech Mahindra come for the placements. Overall, the experience is good as other students who don't get the placements still get the experience.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in the campus. A big Library with all the books needed by the students are available. Hostel facilities are also available. I don't know much about the food in mess as I am not a hosteller. Canteen is very big with all the things available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It has a good infrastructure, fun activities, and a business fest.

review_content.Placements: Many reputed companies visit the college to hire students with good salary packages. Many students got offers from Google and such highly reputed companies. But in the end, you will only get the offer you deserve. I suggest you must give yourself a chance to brighten your future with SGIT.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel and campus life are too good. It has an infrastructure that you will rarely get anywhere in Delhi and Ghaziabad. Mess food is tasty and healthy. The hostel is also clean, but you also have to maintain cleanliness from your own end too. I suggest you join this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with our college.

review_content.Placements: Almost 70% of the students got placed. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA, the average salary package offered is 4 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies of our college are Aditya Birla Group and JK Tyres. Almost 50% of the students got an internship in BHEL and Coca-Coal. The most important thing is that it is affiliated to GGSIPU, i.e., Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are provided like Wi-Fi, air-conditioned classrooms, playground, medical facilities, canteen, etc. Our institute also organises fests and functions where we can know other departments also. Hostel facilities are average, but hostel facilities like food and rooms are satisfactory.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: College Location is poor .

review_content.Placements: As being a student of BCA every student has an expectations regarding their internships and placements and this college doesn't fulfill so if we compare the records of here with the other some top colleges providing BCA overall average company used to come campus at the time of placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well maintained by our upper staff of college without a single doubt, they have maintained all the necessary things which should he there in any college infrastructure, all the things here are so clean and there are so many plants and trees which puts a cherry on a cake in terms of infrastructure.

Also, there are cameras placed all over the campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I was a sincere student in my college.

content.Placements: All the students are eligible to sit for the placements but only around 30 percent got the opportunity to actually have one. Companies like Nokia, Samsung, Tech Mahindra come for the placements. Overall, the experience is good as other students who don't get the placements still get the experience.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in the campus. A big Library with all the books needed by the students are available. Hostel facilities are also available. I don't know much about the food in mess as I am not a hosteller. Canteen is very big with all the things available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It has a good infrastructure, fun activities, and a business fest.

content.Placements: Many reputed companies visit the college to hire students with good salary packages. Many students got offers from Google and such highly reputed companies. But in the end, you will only get the offer you deserve. I suggest you must give yourself a chance to brighten your future with SGIT.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel and campus life are too good. It has an infrastructure that you will rarely get anywhere in Delhi and Ghaziabad. Mess food is tasty and healthy. The hostel is also clean, but you also have to maintain cleanliness from your own end too. I suggest you join this college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with our college.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of the students got placed. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA, the average salary package offered is 4 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies of our college are Aditya Birla Group and JK Tyres. Almost 50% of the students got an internship in BHEL and Coca-Coal. The most important thing is that it is affiliated to GGSIPU, i.e., Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are provided like Wi-Fi, air-conditioned classrooms, playground, medical facilities, canteen, etc. Our institute also organises fests and functions where we can know other departments also. Hostel facilities are average, but hostel facilities like food and rooms are satisfactory.

admission_overview.college_name: SGIT School of Management Admission: Fee, Eligibility, Application & Selection

admission_process.title: SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad Admission Process

paragraphs: SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The institute under Sanskar Educational Group acceptsIPU CETscore for admission to UG courses.SGIT Institute of Managementoffers courses at UG and PG levels in Management and Commerce streams. The institute offers AICTE approved courses in affiliation with CCSU,AKTUandGGSIPU.

SGIT offers four courses at UG and PG levels. Candidates need to meet the course-specific eligibility criteria to get admission in the institute. Below areSGIT Institute of Management coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
*In the absence of clarity of selection criteria, the data is taken from unofficial source. Hence, might vary.
Download:SGIT Institute of Management Brochure 2024

SGIT fee include multiple components such as tuition fee, examination fee, uniform charges, uniform enrollment charges, etc. The tuition fee is to be paid annually by the students. Candidates need to confirm their admission by paying the first-year fee in the institute. Below is SGIT Institute of Management fee and seat intake:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

SGIT Institute of Management admissions are currently open. Candidates are first required to register for their preferred course to get admission in the institute. Below are the steps to get a seat in SGIT:
STEP 1: SGIT Institute of Management Application Process 2024

Candidates can fill out the application form for their preferred course on the official website of the institute. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 1,000 via any of the online payment modes to apply for a course.
STEP 2: Selection

SGIT Institute of Management accepts IPU CET score for admission to UG courses. Candidates also get admission based on their score in qualifying exam. For MBA, the selection is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants must ensure they fulfil the course-specific eligibility to get admission in the institute.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
The selected candidates will recieve offer letter. Once selected, candidates need to confirm their admission by paying a course fee.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass a bachelor's degree of a minimum of three-year duration with at least 50% aggregate to apply for SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad MBA. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission. The selection for MBA is based on merit in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad MBA isINR1.5 lakh.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. The total fee of MBA include multiple components such as tuition fee, examination fee, uniform charges, uniform enrollment charges, etc. Besides, candidates also need to pay an application fee of INR 1,000 in the start for registration.

faqs.question: How is MBA at SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad?
faqs.answer: MBA is a popular course of SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad. The course is approved by All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi. The institute has a good placement record. With more than 120 recruiters, SEG recorded an average CTC of INR 3.62 Lacs in Academic Session 2022-23.

courses_data.name: SGIT School of Management, Sanskar Educational Group BBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: SGIT School of Management, Sanskar Educational Groupoffers BBA programme that lasts for 3 years. Students are accepted to BBA programme based on merit. The total tuition fee charged for BBA here isINR 2,04,000. However, there are other components also which can be included in the total fee amount, such as application charges, exam fee, etc. Read on to know more about the SGIT School of Management, Sanskar Educational Group BBA.

faqs.question: Does SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad offer BBA?
faqs.answer: SGIT Institute of Management offers three-year BBA programme divided into six semesters. Aspirants need to complete a minimum of Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate to apply for BBA. The selection for BBA is based on IPU CET score. Candidates can also apply with their score in the qualifying exam for admission to BBA.

faqs.question: What is the cost of studying BBA at SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad BBA isINR2 lakh.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. The total fee of SGIT BBA is a sum of multiple components such as tuition fee, examination fee, uniform charges, uniform enrollment charges, etc. Besides, candidates also need to pay an application fee of INR 1,000 in the start for registration.

faqs.question: Can I apply for SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad BBA after Class 12?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates need to complete Class 12 examination with at least 45% aggregate to apply for SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad BBA course. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission. Aspirants are selected for BBA programme based on their merit or IPU CET score.

faqs.question: Is SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad admission open?
faqs.answer: SGIT School of Management Ghaziabad admissions are currently open. Candidates can fill out the application form for their preferred course on the official website of the institute. Once the application forms are filled, aspirants are selected for admission. Shortlisted candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad with 60% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates need a minimum of Class 12 to apply for UG courses. The minimum aggregate for UG courses ranges between 40% and 45%. Hence, aspirants with 60% in Class 12 can apply for admission to any of the UG programme offered by SGIT Institute of Management.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad without an entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates can get admission in SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad without entrance exam. The institute offers admission to MBA course based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates for MBA only need to fulfil the eligibility criteria set by the institute. For all the UG courses, candidates can apply with IPU CET or qualifying exam merit.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad?
faqs.answer: No, SGIT Institute of Management considers IPU CET score for admission to BBA, BFSI and BCom courses. For MBA, the selection is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants must ensure they fulfil the course-specific eligibility to get admission in the institute. Once selected, aspirants need to confirm their admission by paying a course fee.

reviews.review_heading: College campus is also very neat and clean and has beautiful greenery.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are very good with a facility for online teaching it is a great experience to study here. It has a great atmosphere here. Canteen is also very good on the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: I'm absolutely satisfied with the faculty members, the campus and the seniors.
reviews.review_text: The facilities given to us include a good quality screen projector and Speakers in classrooms and also 2 properly working ACs. The same is for COMPUTER LABS too. A Wi-Fi of Jio Company is also placed. The classrooms are properly maintained. The food available in the canteen is of good quality, fresh and delicious. Also, there are cameras placed all over the campus.

reviews.review_heading: I was a sincere student in my college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the campus. A big Library with all the books needed by the students are available. Hostel facilities are also available. I don't know much about the food in mess as I am not a hosteller. Canteen is very big with all the things available.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good infrastructure, fun activities, and a business fest.
reviews.review_text: Hostel and campus life are too good. It has an infrastructure that you will rarely get anywhere in Delhi and Ghaziabad. Mess food is tasty and healthy. The hostel is also clean, but you also have to maintain cleanliness from your own end too. I suggest you join this college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are provided like Wi-Fi, air-conditioned classrooms, playground, medical facilities, canteen, etc. Our institute also organises fests and functions where we can know other departments also. Hostel facilities are average, but hostel facilities like food and rooms are satisfactory.

reviews.review_heading: College Location is poor .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well maintained by our upper staff of college without a single doubt, they have maintained all the necessary things which should he there in any college infrastructure, all the things here are so clean and there are so many plants and trees which puts a cherry on a cake in terms of infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Reviews of Sanskar College of Engineering and Technology, Sanskar Educational Group.
reviews.review_text: The canteen is very poor here, and it doesn't provide good food. Prices for the food are very high, and the quality of the food is also low. Even they don't maintain hygiene while cooking the food. However, all the other facilities other than the canteen are fine, but you can not expect much from them.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides a commendable infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. There are many plants on campus. It provides great exposure to students. The college has around 5 departments, and all are maintained well by their staff. The food served in the canteen is good, and you can go there if you have a strong appetite.

reviews.review_heading: There is a safe environment around the campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like furnished playground, classrooms, auditorium, laboratory and library. Different kinds of trees are spread all around the campus, which makes a beautiful view for students. Classrooms can accommodate more than 100 students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a clean and hygienic environment.
reviews.review_text: Our college is spread over 2,000 acres of lush green area. There is greenery all around the buildings of every department, and there are two temples in our college. There are also emergency medical facilities for both students and employees.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides attractive infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: As per my perspective, facilities don't meet the requirements. The campus is so beautiful and huge, with a great soothing environment around the classrooms. But there are no proper facilities of air-conditioners in rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Classrooms and laboratories are well-equipped.
reviews.review_text: The campus life is very boring, like most of the time you feel bore around the campus unless and until there are some activities happening there and apart from the Fest days, the experience of facilities are wonderful by the way and some times we feel great in campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college offers a healthy atmosphere here.
reviews.review_text: The sports ground is larger than other colleges which are affiliated with IP university. The college provides the best facilities in terms of air-conditioners and smart boards.

reviews.review_heading: About 75% of attendance is mandatory, which is a big problem.
reviews.review_text: The gender ratio is poor as compared to any other colleges of Delhi affiliation. For tests and activities, massive participation can be seen, and recently they started some new schemes for activities as well.

reviews.review_heading: Our college maintains the campus very clean.
reviews.review_text: There are 4 or 5 departments in our college, and I think all are very innovative and clean. Students also do their best to make a healthy environment around the campus. The college connectivity is less, but still, we manage our arrangements for food as the canteen doesn't serve good food.

paragraphs: Students are offered scholarship at SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad based on their score in qualifying exam or entrance exam. In case of consideration of Class 12 Boards for scholarship amount calculation, best of top 5 subjects is considered. The scholarship facility provided to student at the time of admission will be applicable on all years, as applicable for a programme.

The total fee of MBA include multiple components such as tuition fee, examination fee, uniform charges, uniform enrollment charges, etc. Besides, candidates also need to pay an application fee of INR 1,000 in the start for registration.

Aspirants need to pay the application fee via any of the online payment modes. Once the application fee is paid, candidates must keep the receipt for reference in future.

The total tuition fee for SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad BBA is INR 2 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
